## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]` if behavior changed
- [ ] ARCHITECTURE.md updated if the system shape changed
- [ ] DECISIONS.md updated if a meaningful tradeoff was chosen
- [ ] Tests added or updated where applicable
- [ ] No secrets committed (`grep -r` for tokens, API keys)
- [ ] Brand-context routing preserved (CLAUDE.md §7)
